description: Composition Full sleeves purple and light grey zippered training jacket, made of 100% nylon with a 100% polyester lining, drawstring at the neck, two zippered pockets on the sides, brand name and logo printed on the left chest, and comes with a small zippered pouch to carry essentials Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with like colours in cold water below 30 degrees, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not dry clean Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo The perfect training jacket for all you sporty girls has arrived! This purple and grey jacket is what you ought to wear when you go for your daily runs in the park, or when you are gymming. Absolutely lightweight and attractive, it looks great and feels good. Store your essentials in the pockets, or in the little pouch that comes with the jacket. Pair it with a comfortable vest and track pants or shorts to get going!
